summary: Iteration 113: Validated Language Agent & Smart Image Editor features. Backend: 35/35 tests passed (100%). All endpoints exist and return expected structures. Code structure validated: batch_size=5 in language_agent.py, analyze_scene and smart_edit functions in smart_editor.py. Frontend: All required data-testid attributes present in StoryboardEditor.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: language_agent.py: Has convert_language and review_text_quality functions with batch_size=5
language_agent.py: SUPPORTED_LANGS has 10 languages (pt, en, es, fr, it, de, ja, ko, zh, ar)
language_agent.py: Uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with Claude claude-sonnet-4-20250514 model
smart_editor.py: Has analyze_scene and smart_edit functions
smart_editor.py: Uses Gemini Vision (gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview) for scene analysis
smart_editor.py: Returns structured scene map with characters, objects, background, quality_issues
studio.py: Has all 5 required endpoints (language/convert, language/review, language/status, storyboard/analyze-scene, storyboard/smart-edit)
StoryboardEditor.jsx: Has Language Agent section with Globe icon
StoryboardEditor.jsx: Has smart-mode-toggle (line 694) with Zap icon
StoryboardEditor.jsx: Shows Scene Map when analysis available (line 711)
StoryboardEditor.jsx: Characters in Scene Map are clickable to fill inpaint input (setInpaintPrompt(c.name))
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 113 verified: 1) Language Agent endpoints all working (convert returns status=converting, review returns status=reviewing, status returns language_status and review_status), 2) Smart Editor endpoints working (analyze-scene returns scene analysis, smart-edit returns status=editing), 3) language_agent.py has batch_size=5 for both convert_language and review_text_quality, 4) smart_editor.py uses Gemini Vision for scene analysis, 5) StoryboardEditor.jsx has all required data-testid attributes. DO NOT trigger actual language conversion or smart edit (they cost API credits and take too long).
